title: chore(deps): update dependency autoprefixer to v8.6.5
body:
This PR contains the following updates: | Package | Type | Update | Change | References | |---|---|---|---|---| | autoprefixer | devDependencies | minor | `8.1.0` -> `8.6.5` | [source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer) | --- ### Release Notes
postcss/autoprefixer ### [`v8.6.5`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​865) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.6.4...8.6.5) - Do not show Grid warnings if IE was not selected. ### [`v8.6.4`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​864) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.6.3...8.6.4) - Fix `stretch` prefix in Chrome >= 46. ### [`v8.6.3`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​863) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.6.2...8.6.3) - Add warnings for unsupported Grid features. - Add warnings about wrong Grid properties. - Add note about `grid` option for grid properties in `autoprefixer --info`. ### [`v8.6.2`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​862) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.6.1...8.6.2) - Fix error during adding Grid prefixes in `@media` (by Evgeny Petukhov). ### [`v8.6.1`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​861) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.6.0...8.6.1) - Fix `grid-template` with media queries (by Evgeny Petukhov). ### [`v8.6.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/releases/8.6.0) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.5.2...8.6.0) Autoprefixer 8.6 brings `gap` property support and two values support for `grid-gap`/`gap`. ##### Grid Gap CSSWG [renamed](https://drafts.csswg.org/css-grid/#change-2016-grid-gap) `grid-gap` property to `gap`. [@​yepninja](https://renovatebot.com/gh/yepninja) added `gap` support with 2 values support. Grid layout code bellow will work even in IE if you pass `grid: true` option to Autoprefixer: ```css .main { gap: 10px 20px; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-template-areas: "head head head" "nav main main" "nav foot foot"; } ``` ##### Other Changes - Add `ignoreUnknownVersions` option for [Browserslist](https://renovatebot.com/gh/browserslist/browserslist) ### [`v8.5.2`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​852) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.5.1...8.5.2) - Fix `grid-template` support wit auto row sizes (by Yury Timofeev). ### [`v8.5.1`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​851) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.5.0...8.5.1) - Remove unnecessary warning on `-webkit-fill-available`. ### [`v8.5.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/releases/8.5.0) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.4.1...8.5.0) Autoprefixer 8.5 brings `grid-gap` support and fix `radial-gradient`. ##### Grid Gap [@​yepninja](https://renovatebot.com/gh/yepninja) continues his amazing work of adding CSS Grid Layout support to Autoprefixer. Now he brought `grid-gap`. It is amazing work since IE 11 has gaps support in `-ms-` grids. To add `grid-gap` support for IE 11 Autoprefixer adds addition grid cells. Unfortunately, it will work only if you have `grid-template` in the same rule with `grid-gap`. We had [big discussion](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/pull/1032) with a community about these limits. ```css .page { grid-gap: 33px; -ms-grid-rows: 1fr 33px minmax(100px, 1fr) 33px 2fr; -ms-grid-columns: 1fr 33px 100px 33px 1fr; grid-template: "head head head" 1fr "nav main main" minmax(100px, 1fr) "nav foot foot" 2fr / 1fr 100px 1fr; } ``` Set [`postcss-gap-properties`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/jonathantneal/postcss-gap-properties) before Autoprefixer if you want to use new `gap` property. ##### Radial Gradients Old gradients with prefixes used a different direction syntax. Autoprefixer converts direction to old syntax (or warn you to rewrite direction from old to new syntax). But it has an issue with extent keywords like `circle closest-corner`. We fixed it after [@​BaliBalo](https://renovatebot.com/gh/BaliBalo) [report](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/issues/1002). ```css .mask { -webkit-mask-image: -webkit-radial-gradient(100% 50%, circle closest-corner, black, white); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle closest-corner at 100% 50%, black, white); } ``` ### [`v8.4.1`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​841) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.4.0...8.4.1) - Fix working in old PostCSS versions (by Diablohu). ### [`v8.4.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/releases/8.4.0) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.3.0...8.4.0) Autoprefixer 8.4 brings new control comment to ignore next line. [@​vostrik](https://renovatebot.com/gh/vostrik) implemented the [@​levin-du](https://renovatebot.com/gh/levin-du)’s idea of having control comment to disable only next property/rule: ```css .logo { /* autoprefixer: ignore next */ user-select: none; /* ← ignored */ mask: url(mask.jpg); /* ← will be prefixed */ } /* autoprefixer: ignore next */ ::placholder /* ← ignored */ { text-decoration-style: dotted; /* ← will be prefixed */ } ``` ### [`v8.3.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/releases/8.3.0) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.2.0...8.3.0) Autoprefixer 8.3 adds `@media` support for `grid-template` and fixes gradient direction warning. ##### Media and Grid Layout [@​evgeny-petukhov](https://renovatebot.com/gh/evgeny-petukhov) continues his great work for Grid Layout support in Autoprefixer. Now he improved `@media` support. Now this CSS will work in IE: ```css body { grid-template: [header-left] "head head" 30px [header-right] [main-left] "nav main" 1fr [main-right] [footer-left] "nav foot" 30px [footer-right] / 120px repeat(4, 250px 10px); } header { grid-area: head; } main { grid-area: main; } footer { grid-area: footer; } @​media (min-width: 1000px) { body { grid-template: [header-left] "head" 30px [header-right] [main-left] "main" 1fr [main-right] [footer-left] "footer" 30px [footer-right] / 1fr; } } ``` Don’t forget that Autoprefixer inserts Grid Layout prefixes only if you set `grid: true` option. ##### Gradient Warning [@​radium-v](https://renovatebot.com/gh/radium-v) found that Autoprefixer show warning even if `cover` is outside of `radial-gradient`. ```css a { background: radial-gradient(#fff, transparent) 0 0 / cover no-repeat #f0f; } ``` [@​kotfire](https://renovatebot.com/gh/kotfire) improve old direction detection and fix this issue. ### [`v8.2.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/releases/8.2.0) [Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/autoprefixer/compare/8.1.0...8.2.0) Autoprefixer 8.2 brings [`color-adjust`](https://drafts.csswg.org/css-color-4/#color-adjust) support. [@​YozhikM](https://renovatebot.com/gh/YozhikM), [@​soul-wish](https://renovatebot.com/gh/soul-wish), and [@​yuriyalekseyev](https://renovatebot.com/gh/yuriyalekseyev) did a great work. They added new data to Can I Use and implemented a new feature to Autoprefixer. ```css body { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; color-adjust: exact; } ```
--- ### Renovate configuration :date: **Schedule**: "every weekend" in timezone Europe/Paris. :vertical_traffic_light: **Automerge**: Enabled. :recycle: **Rebasing**: Whenever PR is stale, or if you modify the PR title to begin with "`rebase!`". :no_bell: **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again. --- This PR has been generated by [Renovate Bot](https://renovatebot.com/gh/marketplace/renovate). View repository job log [here](https://renovatebot.com/dashboard#algolia/instantsearch.js).
